overall.description: First-person exploration of an ornate, empty vintage theater interior in a video game. The player walks through hallways, enters the auditorium, approaches the illuminated screen arch, explores the balcony levels, and observes the projection booth beam in a richly detailed, atmospheric environment with warm artificial lighting.

merged_segments.scene_description: The shot follows a continuous first-person journey from a confined, intimate corridor into the vast, atmospheric expanse of a vintage theater auditorium. It begins by moving through a narrow, warmly lit hallway with ornate carpet and wood paneling before passing through large wooden double doors. As the camera enters the darkened auditorium, it glides down the central aisle past rows of empty red velvet seats toward the glow of the distant screen. The view then tilts upward to admire the massive, illuminated ornate arch and intricate ceiling details as the camera reaches the front of the house. Finally, the perspective pivots away from the screen to reveal the theater's full scale, encompassing the upper balcony, projection booth windows, and a spiral staircase leading upward.

The shot follows a continuous camera movement that ascends from the theater's main floor to a high vantage point on the balcony before returning to the ground level. It begins by climbing a narrow spiral staircase with red carpeting and white railings, moving upward through dim lighting. As the camera emerges onto the upper balcony, the view expands to overlook the illuminated screen and ornate arch below, passing a flower stand along the railing. The scene then shifts along the side balcony to reveal a bright projection beam cutting through the darkness toward the screen, with upper tier seating visible to the left. Finally, the camera descends the spiral staircase, leaving the projection view behind as it heads back toward the lower doorway.
